products.title: RevenueLeak Audit
products.description: Most local businesses already get calls, messages, profile views — but lose customers silently due to missed replies, weak profiles, no clear CTA, no follow-up. The audit scans Google Business, Facebook, and public presence; delivers a 5-leak report with exact fixes — €20-50 per audit, €50-150 for done-for-you fixes.
products.subject_line: I'll show you 3 ways you're currently losing customers — free preview.
products.why_works: They don't need more traffic — they're not converting what they already have. Audit + fix = direct, measurable ROI.

products.title: AI Phone Agent
products.tagline: 24/7 AI Voice Receptionist for Local Services
products.description: Plumbers, electricians, HVAC, dentists frequently miss calls — on-site, busy, unreachable. Each missed call is lost revenue (often €100-500+ jobs). The AI Phone Agent answers instantly, qualifies leads with basic questions, captures details, and books or forwards to the business. €50-150/mo subscription.
products.subject_line: Quick question — are you able to answer every call that comes in?
products.why_works: Missed calls = lost revenue. The AI never sleeps and always qualifies the same way. Clear ROI in week one.

products.title: ReviewBoost
products.description: Businesses know reviews matter, but they forget to ask, requests are inconsistent, happy customers leave without leaving a review. The system generates a direct review link + QR code, ready-to-use templates, and AI-personalized timed follow-ups. €5-20/mo or €20-50 one-time setup.
products.subject_line: Your reviews are great — but you could be getting more.
wins: More reviews = more visibility = more customers
Easy to sell to almost any business
after_bullets: Direct link + QR at every checkout
products.why_works: More reviews → more visibility → more customers. Fast, visible results that sell themselves.
